Success!
Running Requested Task...

ABOUT

AutoApply is a free Chrome extension that uses AI to autofill job forms with tailor made resumes and cover letters.

Usage

  1. Upload your resume and bio, and connect ChatGPT
  2. Find a job you like and hit 'auto-load' to pull the job description off the page
    • Tailor your resume
  3. Click 'auto-apply' to fill it's form

FAQ

What is a ChatGPT Key?
ChatGPT is a language model that can fill out forms. You need a key to use it.
How To Get A Key:
  1. Create a OpenAI account
  2. Configure your billing
  3. Create your key
  4. Copy it into your settings
How do I connect ChatGPT?
AutoApply uses OpenAI's ChatGPT to work. Login to AutoApply and buy credits or connect your ChatGPT account using an API Key.
How much is this?
AutoApply is free to use but ChatGPT costs a couple pennies per application.
Why Log In?
  • Save your data in the cloud (5$ a month) to access your data from any device.
  • Buy credits (10% fee) and skip connecting a ChatGPT account.


Welcome to AutoApply!

Use AI to fill out job application forms and create tailored resumes and cover letters.

Login content




Bio Example:


Hi ChatGPT! My name is Betty.
I use a lot of emojis and exclamation points!
Please do that too!

Age: 45
Location: New York
Pronouns: She/Her
Hispanic: Yes
Race: Prefer not to answer
Disability: None
Veteran: Spouse
Criminal History: Do not answer
Hobbies: Skating, Reading, and Writing

💡 Tell the AI anything not already in your resume that it may need know in order to fill out a job form.
